question_frequency.rationale: The Tutor asked zero didactic questions. All teachable content was delivered as exposition after the user asked their own questions. The roles were essentially inverted — the student drove the inquiry.

question_quality.rationale: No choices or forks were framed by the Tutor. The Tutor wrote the full solution upfront and then explained it; no consequential decision points were posed.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding to speak of — the complete solution and tests were dumped in turn 1, and explanation followed only in response to student-initiated questions.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and the explanations of Python's modulo behavior and the helper-extraction rationale are clear and actionable. Flow is fine but one-directional (lecture-style).

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
